## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would alter existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation / sample only
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew :tessera:test :tessera-hilt:test` passes locally.
- [ ] `./gradlew :tessera:assemble :tessera-hilt:assemble` passes locally.
- [ ] New / changed public API has KDoc.
- [ ] New behaviour has a unit test; bug fixes have a regression test.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` (if user-visible).
- [ ] No new warnings from `-Xexplicit-api=strict`.
